# imageProvider

**Instance Property**

The image to display.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var imageProvider: CLKFullColorImageProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This image provider produces a full-color image, masked to a circle.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.
- **leadingTextProvider**: The text to display on the leading edge of the gauge.
- **trailingTextProvider**: The text to display on the trailing edge of the gauge.
